name: Birdie's Sporting Club
about: Birdie's Sporting Club, located in Brooklyn, is an indoor golf venue featuring X-Golf technology, which combines laser, light, impact, and camera sensory technologies to collect raw golf data. The facility offers golf simulators that can accommodate 1-6 players per bay, with a total capacity of 10 people per bay. A range of playing options is available, including driving ranges, practice shots, par 3 courses, 46 full courses, and competitive games. The venue also functions as a clubhouse with food and beverage offerings, making it suitable for both casual play and social events. Bookings are typically opened 7 days in advance, with members receiving access to early booking windows.
why_golfers_like_it: Proprietary X-Golf technology providing the most accurate and comprehensive indoor golf simulation in the world
Variety of playing options including 46 full courses and driving ranges
Amenities like a clubhouse, food and beverage options, and club rentals for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Gluten-free options available; child-friendly food options; no outside food allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulator combining laser, light, impact, and camera sensory technologies

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available for $35 per set, per booking.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers its own menu with gluten-free options and child-friendly choices.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified, but it depends on the course and player speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes all ages and offers youth club rentals and child-friendly food and drink options.
